Commission Every week Perry gets paid $150 plus 12% of his total sales amount over $1,250. Solve the equation $$840 = 150 + 0.12 ( a - 1250 )$$ for a , to find the total amount Perry must sell in order to be paid $840 one week.

Stamps Travis bought $9.45 worth of 49-cent stamps and 21-cent stamps. The number of 21-cent stamps was 5 less than the number of 49-cent stamps. Solve the equation $$0.49 s + 0.21 \text{​} ( s - 5 ) \text{​} \text{​} = 9.45$$ for s , to find the number of 49-cent stamps Travis bought.
